data.body: CLOSE-GATE OBSTACLE (version skew): recently-landed close-gate changes (transition_close/attest phase model) enforce that an ordinary close needs an EXECUTION-phase plan-review attestation (attest.py:548-558: enforced CLOSE + signed review-phase=planning -> forced incompatible). All 5 leaves' attestations are PLANNING-phase. review-plan --force DRIFT-REFRESHES (refresh_attestation preserves prior manifest review-phase=planning; the drift_refresh at __init__.py:594 fires on 'if sign:' regardless of --force, contradicting its own comment), so --force cannot produce an execution-phase review while the plan matches merged code. WORKAROUND being validated: a material change (append benign '## Landed' provenance note to description) makes recorded_material != current_material -> drift_refresh won't converge -> full re-review in execution phase. Testing on 97f2.
